_comment: Shared CRSF golden vectors — the one cross-repo wire truth between the firmware
decoder (shared/crsf.js). Each `frame` is the exact on-wire byte sequence
decode from it. If a byte offset, endianness, or CRC domain drifts on EITHER side,
these decodes fail. Values mirror the firmware builder tests (test_crsf/test_main.cpp:
test_build_flight_mode_frame_*). CRC bytes computed with the CRC-8/DVB-S2 (poly 0xD5)
the audit proved identical across firmware + JS via the 0xBC '123456789' KAT.

battery.note: 7.9 V (79 dV = 0x004F), current 0, capacity 0, remaining 72%. Matches firmware test_build_battery_frame_bytes.

gps.note: groundspeed 361 = 36.1 km/h (0x0169 at payload[8..9]); altitude 1000 baseline (0x03E8); lat/lon/heading/sats 0. Matches firmware test_build_gps_frame_groundspeed_be.

flightmode.note: "G3 M2 E55" + NUL terminator, as firmware buildFlightModeFrame + main.cpp snprintf("G%u M%u E%u") emit. gear 3 / driveMode 2 / ERS 55%.

linkStatistics.note: uplinkLinkQuality 87 at offset 2; uplinkSnr -10 (0xF6); downlinkSnr 5. Reported by the ground TX module, not the car.
